objective.goal: Improve consistency of an earnings gap-up continuation setup

strategy_context.summary: Buys post-earnings gap-up stocks when price holds above VWAP and breaks day-one high.
known_pain_points: Late entries after noon show poor expectancy
False continuation when opening range volume is weak
Stop placement too tight in high ATR names

execution_constraints: No more than one order amendment per position

market_context.summary: Risk-on tape with concentrated post-earnings leadership in software and semis.
observations: Leaders often reclaim VWAP within first 30 minutes
Continuation quality drops when market breadth deteriorates intraday

common_winner_traits: First pullback holds above session VWAP
common_loser_traits: Entry taken after failed second breakout

journal_snippets.note: Tried requiring first 15m close above VWAP; improved selectivity but fewer trades.
Tried adding tick-level imbalance proxy; not robust across brokers.
Using opening range contraction before break looked promising in top decile volume names.

qualitative_notes: Execution slippage spikes around macro headline releases
